baseline_matrix.comparison_rule: Free-data rehearsal only; this config may not be promoted as Phase 06 authority closure.

rights_policy.freeze_rule: Reproducible provenance is required, but this lane remains a rehearsal proxy rather than the authority suite.

ft_c004.unresolved_rule: Auto-generated queries on this lane are non-authority and must remain NEEDS_LABELS.
